info.name: Watfil API — Complete
info.description:
# Watfil API — 89 Endpoint

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}` = `http://localhost:8000/api`

---

## البداية السريعة

```
php artisan migrate --seed
php artisan serve
```

1. Import هذا الملف في Postman
2. شغّل **00 — Setup Flow** (11 خطوة)
3. استخدم مجلد **All Endpoints** لأي endpoint

**Super Admin:** `admin@watafl.com` / `Admin@1234`

---

## Headers

| Header | القيمة |
|--------|--------|
| Accept | application/json |
| Authorization | Bearer `{token}` |
| Content-Type | application/json |

---

## شكل الاستجابة

- **قائمة:** `{ data: [], meta: { total, current_page, last_page, per_page } }`
- **طفرات:** `{ message, data }`
- **Auth:** `{ message, token, customer }`
- **422:** `{ message, errors: { field: [] } }`

---

## فهرس كل الـ Endpoints (89)

- `GET /public/governorates` — GET Governorates
- `GET /public/product-types` — GET Product Types
- `GET /public/categories` — GET Categories
- `GET /public/companies` — GET Companies by Governorate
- `GET /public/companies/{{company_id}}` — GET Company Details
- `GET /public/companies/{{company_id}}/products` — GET Store Products
- `GET /public/companies/{{company_id}}/products/{{product_id}}/installment-plans` — GET Product Installment Plans
- `GET /public/maintenance/lookups` — GET Maintenance Lookups
- `POST /super-admin/login` — POST Login
- `POST /super-admin/logout` — POST Logout
- `GET /super-admin/me` — GET Me
- `GET /super-admin/governorates` — GET Governorates
- `GET /super-admin/product-types` — GET List Product Types
- `POST /super-admin/product-types` — POST Create Product Type
- `GET /super-admin/product-types/{{product_type_id}}` — GET Show Product Type
- `POST /super-admin/product-types/{{product_type_id}}` — POST Update Product Type
- `DELETE /super-admin/product-types/{{product_type_id}}` — DELETE Product Type
- `GET /super-admin/categories` — GET List Categories
- `POST /super-admin/categories` — POST Create Category
- `GET /super-admin/categories/{{category_id}}` — GET Show Category
- `POST /super-admin/categories/{{category_id}}` — POST Update Category
- `DELETE /super-admin/categories/{{category_id}}` — DELETE Category
- `GET /super-admin/companies` — GET List Companies
- `POST /super-admin/companies` — POST Create Company
- `GET /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}` — GET Show Company
- `POST /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}` — POST Update Company
- `PATCH /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}/toggle-status` — PATCH Toggle Status
- `DELETE /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}` — DELETE Company
- `GET /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}/wallet` — GET Show Wallet
- `PATCH /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}/wallet` — PATCH Set Balance
- `POST /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}/wallet/adjust` — POST Adjust Wallet
- `GET /super-admin/companies/{{company_id}}/wallet/transactions` — GET Wallet Transactions
- `GET /super-admin/finance/commissions/summary` — GET Commission Summary
- `GET /super-admin/finance/withdrawal-requests` — GET Withdrawal Requests
- `PATCH /super-admin/finance/withdrawal-requests/{{withdrawal_request_id}}/approve` — PATCH Approve Withdrawal
- `PATCH /super-admin/finance/withdrawal-requests/{{withdrawal_request_id}}/reject` — PATCH Reject Withdrawal
- `PATCH /super-admin/finance/withdrawal-requests/{{withdrawal_request_id}}/pay` — PATCH Pay Withdrawal
- `GET /super-admin/suppliers` — GET List Suppliers
- `POST /super-admin/suppliers` — POST Create Supplier
- `GET /super-admin/suppliers/{{supplier_id}}` — GET Show Supplier
- `POST /super-admin/suppliers/{{supplier_id}}` — POST Update Supplier
- `DELETE /super-admin/suppliers/{{supplier_id}}` — DELETE Supplier
- `GET /super-admin/supplier-products` — GET List Supplier Products
- `POST /super-admin/supplier-products` — POST Create Supplier Product
- `GET /super-admin/supplier-products/{{supplier_product_id}}` — GET Show Supplier Product
- `POST /super-admin/supplier-products/{{supplier_product_id}}` — POST Update Supplier Product
- `PATCH /super-admin/supplier-products/{{supplier_product_id}}/toggle-status` — PATCH Toggle Product Status
- `DELETE /super-admin/supplier-products/{{supplier_product_id}}` — DELETE Supplier Product
- `GET /super-admin/orders` — GET List Orders
- `GET /super-admin/orders/{{order_id}}` — GET Show Order
- `POST /company/login` — POST Login
- `POST /company/logout` — POST Logout
- `GET /company/me` — GET Me
- `GET /company/products` — GET List Products
- `POST /company/products` — POST Create Product
- `GET /company/products/{{product_id}}` — GET Show Product
- `POST /company/products/{{product_id}}` — POST Update Product
- `DELETE /company/products/{{product_id}}` — DELETE Product
- `GET /company/catalog/available` — GET Available Catalog
- `GET /company/catalog/mine` — GET My Catalog
- `POST /company/catalog/add` — POST Add to Catalog (bulk)
- `POST /company/catalog/remove` — POST Remove from Catalog (bulk)
- `POST /company/catalog/{{supplier_product_id}}` — POST Add Single to Catalog
- `DELETE /company/catalog/{{supplier_product_id}}` — DELETE Remove from Catalog
- `GET /company/wallet/transactions` — GET Wallet Transactions
- `POST /company/wallet/withdrawals` — POST Request Withdrawal
- `GET /company/customers` — GET List Customers
- `GET /company/orders` — GET List Orders
- `POST /company/orders` — POST Create Order
- `GET /company/orders/{{order_id}}` — GET Show Order
- `PATCH /company/orders/{{order_id}}/status` — PATCH Update Order Status
- `POST /customer/register` — POST Register
- `POST /customer/login` — POST Login
- `POST /customer/logout` — POST Logout
- `GET /customer/me` — GET Me
- `PATCH /customer/profile` — PATCH Update Profile
- `POST /customer/auth/check-phone` — POST Check Phone
- `POST /customer/register/request-otp` — POST Request OTP
- `POST /customer/register/verify` — POST Verify Registration
- `GET /customer/orders` — GET List Orders
- `POST /customer/orders` — POST Create Order
- `GET /customer/orders/{{order_id}}` — GET Show Order
- `GET /customer/maintenance-requests` — GET List Maintenance Requests
- `POST /customer/maintenance-requests` — POST Create Maintenance Request
- `GET /customer/maintenance-requests/{{maintenance_request_id}}` — GET Show Maintenance Request
- `POST /customer/companies/{{company_id}}/like` — POST Like Company
- `DELETE /customer/companies/{{company_id}}/like` — DELETE Unlike Company
- `POST /customer/companies/{{company_id}}/rating` — POST Rate Company
- `DELETE /customer/companies/{{company_id}}/rating` — DELETE Remove Rating


---

## سيناريوهات

**طلب + عمولة:** pending → processing → completed (5% إلا referral/internal)

**سحب:** request → approve → pay (أو reject + reason)

**عميل:** register + company_id للربط بالشركة

item.name: 00 — Setup Flow
item.description:
إعداد بيئة اختبار — شغّل بالترتيب

يملأ: super_admin_token, company_id, governorate_id, supplier_id, supplier_product_id, product_id, customer_id, customer_token, order_id

request.description:
## POST /super-admin/companies

**Body:** name, tax_number, password, governorate_id, is_active

**multipart** إذا في logo

## POST /company/products

**Body:** name, cash_price, is_active, installment_plans[] (optional), description, image

## POST /customer/register

**Body:** phone, password, password_confirmation, full_name, governorate_id, city, address, email, company_id (optional)

## POST /company/orders

**Body:** customer_id, payment_type (cash|installment), items[], discount, notes, source, idempotency_key

**cash:** بدون installment_plan

**installment:** منتج واحد + installment_plan { months, down_payment, installment_amount } من خطط المنتج

**source.channel:** ad | referral | link | direct

## POST /customer/register

**Body:** phone, password, password_confirmation, full_name, governorate_id, city, address, email, company_id (optional)

## PATCH /customer/profile

**Body (all optional):** email, full_name, governorate_id, city, address, date_of_birth, gender

## POST /company/orders

**Body:** customer_id, payment_type (cash|installment), items[], discount, notes, source, idempotency_key

**cash:** بدون installment_plan

**installment:** منتج واحد + installment_plan { months, down_payment, installment_amount } من خطط المنتج

**source.channel:** ad | referral | link | direct

## PATCH /company/orders/{order}/status

**Body:** status (processing|completed|cancelled), note, cancellation_reason (required if cancelled)

**completed** → CommissionService (5%)

## PATCH /company/orders/{order}/status

**Body:** status (processing|completed|cancelled), note, cancellation_reason (required if cancelled)

**completed** → CommissionService (5%)

## GET /customer/orders

**Query:** status, company_id, from, to, per_page

## GET /super-admin/orders

**Query:** status, company_id, customer_id, from, to, per_page

## GET /public/maintenance/lookups

**Auth:** لا

**Response:** purification_systems, stages_counts, primary_problem_types, malfunction_types, max_stages

استخدم القيم في نموذج طلب الصيانة

## GET /public/companies

**Auth:** لا (Bearer اختياري لـ is_liked)

**Query (required):** `governorate_id`

**Response:** شركات نشطة + likes_count + ratings_avg

## GET /public/companies/{company}/products

**Auth:** لا

**Query:** page, category_id, product_type_id, number_of_stages

**Response:** منتجات + category + installment_plans

## GET /public/companies/{company}/products/{companyProduct}/installment-plans

**Auth:** لا

**Response:** cash_price + plans[] مع remaining_amount و total_amount

استخدم قبل زر "قسط من هنا"

item.name: All Endpoints
item.description:
كل الـ 89 endpoint — واحد لكل route في routes/api.php

افتح Description لأي request للتفاصيل الكاملة

request.description:
## GET /public/product-types

**Auth:** لا

**Response:** device | accessories | stages للفلترة

## GET /public/maintenance/lookups

**Auth:** لا

**Response:** purification_systems, stages_counts, primary_problem_types, malfunction_types, max_stages

استخدم القيم في نموذج طلب الصيانة

## GET /public/companies

**Auth:** لا (Bearer اختياري لـ is_liked)

**Query (required):** `governorate_id`

**Response:** شركات نشطة + likes_count + ratings_avg

## GET /public/companies/{company}/products

**Auth:** لا

**Query:** page, category_id, product_type_id, number_of_stages

**Response:** منتجات + category + installment_plans

## GET /public/companies/{company}/products/{companyProduct}/installment-plans

**Auth:** لا

**Response:** cash_price + plans[] مع remaining_amount و total_amount

استخدم قبل زر "قسط من هنا"

## POST /super-admin/companies

**Body:** name, tax_number, password, governorate_id, is_active

**multipart** إذا في logo

## POST /super-admin/companies/{company}

**ملاحظة:** POST وليس PUT — يدعم multipart

## GET /super-admin/companies/{company}/wallet/transactions

**Query:** direction, category, from, to, per_page

## GET /super-admin/orders

**Query:** status, company_id, customer_id, from, to, per_page

## POST /company/products

**Body:** name, cash_price, is_active, installment_plans[] (optional), description, image

## POST /company/products/{companyProduct}

POST وليس PUT — multipart للصورة

## GET /company/orders

**Query:** status, customer_id, from, to, per_page

## POST /company/orders

**Body:** customer_id, payment_type (cash|installment), items[], discount, notes, source, idempotency_key

**cash:** بدون installment_plan

**installment:** منتج واحد + installment_plan { months, down_payment, installment_amount } من خطط المنتج

**source.channel:** ad | referral | link | direct

## PATCH /company/orders/{order}/status

**Body:** status (processing|completed|cancelled), note, cancellation_reason (required if cancelled)

**completed** → CommissionService (5%)

## POST /customer/register

**Body:** phone, password, password_confirmation, full_name, governorate_id, city, address, email, company_id (optional)

## PATCH /customer/profile

**Body (all optional):** email, full_name, governorate_id, city, address, date_of_birth, gender

## POST /customer/register/request-otp

**Body:** phone

في APP_DEBUG=true يرجع debug_otp

## POST /customer/register/verify

**Body:** phone, otp, name, password, password_confirmation, governorate_id

## GET /customer/orders

**Query:** status, company_id, from, to, per_page

## POST /customer/orders

**Body:** company_id, payment_type, items[], source, idempotency_key

**cash:** payment_type=cash بدون installment_plan

**installment:** payment_type=installment + installment_plan { months, down_payment, installment_amount } + منتج واحد

يتطلب ربط active مع الشركة

## POST /customer/maintenance-requests

**Auth:** Bearer customer_token

**Body (JSON):**
- company_id, full_name, phone
- governorate_id, city, area, address_details (optional)
- device_details, purification_system, stages_count
- last_stage_change_dates: { stage_1..stage_N } حسب stages_count
- primary_problem_type, malfunction_type, notes (optional)

**Lookups:** GET /public/maintenance/lookups

**multipart (optional):** + image (jpeg/png/webp max 2MB)
